# Flagged / blocked accounts

Log of every account added to [`blocked-contributors.txt`](./blocked-contributors.txt),
with the reason and date. Maintained by the bot when it blocks an account
(see `eval/pr_bot.py`); maintainers may also add entries manually for
out-of-band abuse (sybil accounts, sock puppets, etc.).

*(empty -- no account has been blocked yet)*

| date | account | reason | linked PR(s) |
|------|---------|--------|--------------|
